zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Leigh於1569年出生在英國戴文金斯泰尼頓時，她的父親William Leich22歲，母親Joyce Gravener20歲。她於1590年與John Radford在英國戴文德利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年在英國享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Leigh于1569年出生在英国戴文金斯泰尼頓时，她的父亲William Leich22岁，母亲Joyce Gravener20岁。她于1590年与John Radford在英国戴文德利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年在英国享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Leigh was born in 1569, in Kingsteignton, Devon, England, her father, William Leich, was 22 and her mother, Joyce Gravener, was 20. She married John Radford in 1590, in Chudleigh, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1664, in England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Leigh est née en 1569, à Kingsteignton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Leich, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joyce Gravener, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Radford en 1590, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1664, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Leighが1569年にイギリスデボンキングステイグントンで生まれた時，父William Leichは22歳，母Joyce Gravenerは20歳であった。1590年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグでJohn Radfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年にイギリスで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Leigh(이)가 1569년 영국 데폰 킨그스테익턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Leich(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Gravener(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 John Radford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 영국에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Leigh родилась в 1569 г. в местности кингстиинтон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Leich было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joyce Gravener, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Radford в 1590 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1664 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 95 лет.
